title: Compass Coordinates
description: Makes compasses show coordinates and facing above hotbar
body:
# What does this datapack do?
This datapack displays your coordinates and facing when holding compass or day number and time when holding clock.

![Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bd0ba7198c8ec847730bf719b39f251d8b7335d.png)
![Clock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9569d99520ab7b3faab0bbccf6873e8edf9be3e.png)

# How to change colors?
You can change it in the config. Use /trigger cc_config command for it to show up. Each player has their own settings.


![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7390f6056db14db7c65a4da375e2890a1843b4b2.png)
![tc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45ab13ece22f4e8732381eb6876bf971140f83d0.png)
![vc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c74a666fed294bc422ccef9c8dfb9921d56fdaab.png)


<details>
<summary>Old config</summary>
  
![old](https://i.imgur.com/QuwLtmz.png)

</details>
